description: You are a Sustainability Consultant performing a Whole Life Carbon assessment on the pre-loaded FZK-Haus IFC model. Review the LCA specification on the desktop for required material carbon factors. Create two IFC materials, 'C30/37 Concrete' and 'Structural Timber', each containing the 'Pset_EnvironmentalImpactIndicators' property set with a 'GlobalWarmingPotential' property using the values from the specification. Assign the 'C30/37 Concrete' material to at least two IfcSlab elements and the 'Structural Timber' material to at least six IfcWall elements. Save the updated project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_embodied_carbon.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: anti_pattern4_max_partial=39 (file=15, timber=10, psets=14), threshold=70 safely above
